channel.title: Azure Migrate on Sujith Quintelier
channel.description: Recent content in Azure Migrate on Sujith Quintelier

item.title: azure: [In preview] Public Preview: Azure Migrate – GitHub Copilot Modernization integration for at scale code assessments
item.description:
Azure Migrate public preview now integrates with GitHub Copilot Modernization to provide at-scale code insights. The integration combines Azure Migrate’s portfolio-level discovery and assessment with Copilot’s context-aware code analysis.

  • Source: Azure Updates

item.title: azure: [Launched] Generally Available: Azure Files assessments are now available worldwide using Azure Migrate
item.description:
Azure Migrate now generally supports discovery and assessment of SMB and NFS file shares on Windows and Linux servers worldwide. The update provides a data-driven view of file share environments and helps customers plan migration.

  • Source: Azure Updates
